figure_name: Kalki himself will be one with the divine, and is also mysteriously described as being a "yantra-manava," or a machine-man. According to some legends of the end of the world, Kalkin’s horse will stamp the earth with its right foot, causing the tortoise which supports the world to drop into the deep.
She Will Give You a Crown of Glory
She Will Give You a Garland
